case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. VS. FUNG WONG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,402.79 FILED BY KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, FUNG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN LEGASPI--COMMUNITY RELATIONS--PUBLIC INFO. OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, FUNG $1,402.79 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,482.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
